title: Questions from Quarantine: Family Childcare Help and Going Outside Guidelines
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project presents a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address public concerns during quarantine. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' provides practical advice on maintaining mental and physical well-being during a global health crisis. Each Tuesday, the hosts answer viewer-submitted questions, covering topics such as family childcare assistance and guidelines for safe outdoor activities. The initiative encourages public participation through social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. This program is part of a broader effort to disseminate reliable information and support community resilience, connecting public health guidance with security considerations in times of widespread disruption.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在解答隔离期间的公众疑问。该系列名为“隔离问题”，在全球健康危机期间提供保持心理和生理健康的实用建议。每周二，主持人会回答观众提交的问题，涵盖家庭儿童照护帮助和安全外出活动指南等主题。该倡议通过社交媒体话题标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine鼓励公众参与。此项目是传播可靠信息、支持社区韧性的更广泛努力的一部分，在普遍混乱时期将公共卫生指导与安全考量联系起来。
